title: Claude Code Leak: What's Happening?
summary: Jordan Urbs analyzes a leaked Claude Code source map file to reveal its architecture as a TypeScript harness wrapping an LLM with a 3-layer memory system. The video discusses copyright implications of AI-generated code, token subsidy economics, privacy concerns around Datadog telemetry, and demonstrates installing the leaked code on a home server with Venice AI as an alternative to paid proprietary platforms.
